ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Esate.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Lillian Ng appearing via zoom for Gayle Hasley (Petitioner).

The Court finds that publication is sufficient. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated September 26, 2019 is admitted to probate. Gayle Hasley is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To May-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
